key_insight: FormalAnalyticGeo uses a neural-symbolic pipeline to automatically generate multimodal analytic geometry problems with aligned text, precise diagrams, and verified answers.
engineering_relevance: It provides a scalable way to build high-quality geometry datasets by combining formal language, SDF-based rendering, and automated quality control without human annotation.
method: Generator creates diverse analytic geometry problems.
Formalizer converts each problem into CDL for precise SDF diagram rendering.
Measurer and Quality Verifier extract ground truth and trigger automatic retries when needed.
evidence_signal: The resulting AnalyticGeo7K dataset has over 7K verified problems, with a median ground-truth relative error of 0.70% and 82.3% of answers within 5% of the exact symbolic solution.
watch_item: Accuracy depends on the reliability of the formalization, rendering, and vision-based measurement pipeline, so error accumulation or failure cases may still occur in complex layouts.
paper_title: FormalAnalyticGeo: A Neural-Symbolic Based Framework for Multimodal Analytic Geometry Problem Generation
